Name: CHUCK TAYLOR WMNS PLATFORM LAYER OX
Description: N/A

Name: CHUCK 70 LOW WHITE

Additional vintage details include stitching on the sidewall and a heavier-grade vintage canvas upper for comfort and durability. They join iconic Chuck Taylor attributes such as the star-centered ankle patch and vulcanized rubber outsole.

Utilising a continuous line scribble graphic technique, in cool colour combinations and with street-ready swagger, youíll look fierce, fun and fresh.

Zer0.4, the first to feature double-stacked Zoom in the forefoot. Itís an extra-responsive cushioning system thatís designed to help him transform speed into force and focus his attack.

Name: WMNíS SB BLZR COURT SKATE LIGHT CITRON
Description: N/A

A continuous line creation, with lightweight tooling and a platform silhouette, your look will be lifted in more ways than one.

Description: The Disc Rebirth marks the 30th anniversary of the PUMA Disc System. Weíve grabbed design details from the original and combined it with modern performance technology to bring the disc back on court in a bigger and better way. Rest assured, youíll be shooting hoops in pure PUMA style.

With bold pops of colour, the Vision iteration features premium materials for a sophisticated silhouette that will have you rocking retro with cool confidence.

VINTAGE-INSPIRED SHOES DESIGNED IN COLLABORATION WITH DANIELLE GUIZIO
NYC-based designer Danielle Guizioís label reimagines í80s and í90s sport styles and updates them with a modern aesthetic. Feel inspired every time you lace up these statement Club C 85 shoes from Reebok and Guizio. They come with two lace options and flash an empowering quote on the tongue. Description:
Crocs may not spring to mind when you think of utilitarian outdoorwear, but the esoteric footwear label teams with experimental artist Nicole McLaughlin to reshape all the pre-conceived associations. At the core, itís a regular clog, with a foam construction, ventilation holes and a heel strap, should you want to go full sport mode. But, in Mclaughlinís usual style, itís reimagined with a host of out-there additions.
Thereís a gaiter-like shroud that extends up the ankle ó with a pocket, of course ó and various jibbitzô adornments that would often be deemed essential on a weekend camping trip, including a compass and a light.

Description: Dazzle the competition in our NRGY Star Sneakers, engineered with a PU SoftFoam sockliner to give you an unbelievably comfortable stride at mile one or mile 24 and a slip-on construction so you can be ready for action in a flash.

Description: The LeBron 17 harnesses LeBronís strength and speed with containment and support for all-court domination. It features a lightweight mix of knit and heat-molded yarns that give each one a durable look and feel.

Name: WMNS FREE RN FLYKNIT 2018
Description: The Nike Free RN Flyknit 2018 brings you miles of comfort with a Flyknit upper that delivers zoned stretch and breathability. The outsole pattern adjusts to your every step for a dynamic ride from top to bottom

Name: V94M
Description: FILAís been running laps around the chunky sneaker circuit after a number of successful launches in recent years helped establish the sportstyle brand as a stylish value proposition for sneakerheads on a budget. One of the silhouettes FILA brought back last year is the V94M, a reissue of its original Venom silhouette that first dropped in 1994.

Name: DAYTONA DMX II
Description: Throwback running style inspires these womenís shoes. Perforation and a peek-a-boo Vector logo on the side add a feminine touch. Authentic DMX cushioning circulates air from the front to the back of your foot as you walk.

Name: AZTREK 96 REINVENTE
Description: The Aztrek 96 updates heritage Aztrek designs with a more angular shape and added overlays. Made of a mix of textile and textured suede, the shoes show off authentic retro style with í90s-era colour pops and an X-shape on the toe.

Name: DISRUPTOR 2 MADE IN ITALY
Description: Trust the experts. When it comes to making a seriously comfortable pair of Dad sneaker, no one does it better than Fila.

Name: YUNG-1
Description: The Yung-1 offers a creative take on running styles of the late í90s. These shoes mix suede and mesh for a layered look. The wavy geometric design and bold colors add authentic turn-of-the-millennium style.

Name: AZTREK TEAL
Description: N/A

Name: CL LTHR FASHION CLIP
Description: This womenís shoe is based on the original design and incorporates a muddy heel clip with futuristic 3D design. The shoelace wraps the foot, and there is a rubber band adjustment design on the heel. The upper is made of a mixture of leather and knitted materials for comfort.

Name: DAYTONA DMX TRB
Description: The Reebok DMX Daytona is a true ī90s legend. And now we get another look at this upscale version of the retro trainer, featuring a leather upper with velvet accents and lining.

Name: FALCON RX W
Description: Fearless í90s confidence inspires these shoes. They echo the look of retro sneakers with a chunky, sculpted outsole. A glossy paint effect gives the soft leather upper a striking look. A wide elastic band makes them easy to slip on and off.

Name: DMX RUN 10 MU
Description: The 1997 DMX Run 10 shoes get remixed with bold colors. The bright style from the upper is echoed in the signature DMX outsole. DMX cushioning moves air when you walk for comfort with every stride.

Name: AZTREK 96
Description: The Aztrek 96 updates heritage Aztrek designs with a more angular shape and added overlays. Made of a mix of textile and faux suede, the shoes show off authentic retro style with bold lines and an X-shape on the toe.

Name: GEL KYANO 5 OG
Description: 1999ís GEL-KAYANOô 5 OG running shoe returns with its original construction. After an initial sketch on paper, designer Toshikazu Kayano was quick to point out that the upper mirrored the human anatomyís bone structuring, organs and muscles.
